# Connection configuration

[Download JSON Schema](/docs/schemas/connection.schema.json)

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: libredash.dev/v1
kind: Connection
metadata:
  name: olist
  title: Olist CSV files
spec:
  kind: managed
  description: Project-global managed Olist ecommerce demo data.
  credentials:
    provider: none
  defaults:
    options:
      header: true
```
